acct-pri.notes: Core differentiation. Predictive buying-stage scoring depth unmatched.

intent-res.notes: Intent breadth and depth is the moat. ZI has solid coverage; Apollo minimal.

contact-disc.notes: Commoditizing fast. ZI/Cognism/Apollo closing gap. Win by owning identity resolution on top of partner data.

techno-psycho.notes: HG owns standalone technographics. We win by combining with intent + buying stage.

chrome.notes: Primary distribution channel going forward. Most critical build area.

ai-insights.notes: Adoption low — likely distribution gap, not product gap. Needs Chrome Ext delivery.

comp-takeout.notes: Only 6sense combines tech + competitor intent + buying stage. Underexposed use case.

deal-ent.notes: 6sense flagship. ZI/Apollo reactive only. AEs need behavior change to act pre-hand-raise.

buy-cmte.notes: Apollo partial coverage. Key for multi-threading before deals stall.

deal-acc.notes: Gong/Clari own conversation-intelligence side. We own account-signal side. Complementary.

acct-plan.notes: ZI strong on firmographics. We win by combining with buying-stage signals for white-space ID.

reengage.notes: Signal-driven dormant reactivation. Only 6sense can own this. Alert delivery is the gap.

rep-pri.notes: Coaching-layer use case. Unique to 6sense. Needs to be part of natural management workflow.

pipe-quality.notes: We own the signal lens; Clari owns activity lens. Complementary — not competing.

forecast-align.notes: Clari dominant. We supply signals into Clari. Deep integration > competing view.

outbound-design.notes: No competitor combines buying-stage + intent + play design at manager level.

utilization-value.notes: CRITICAL. Logins metric dead in Chrome Extension world. Must define new value metric.

acct-map.notes: Crossbeam owns partner overlap. Build account overlap as 6sense-native; partner for ecosystem layer.

abm-model.notes: Operational backbone of 6sense. Routing + orchestration must be best-in-class.

pipe-attr.notes: Without CFO-defensible attribution, renewal conversations rely on anecdote.

territory.notes: RevOps builds this in CRM using our data. Product gap exists but may not be our lane.

bi-conn.notes: BI Connector is TBD. Retention risk if RevOps never opens app but consumes elsewhere.

crm-hygiene.notes: LeanData/Openprise own hygiene. Our job is clean data in/out. Partner play.

churn-risk.notes: Signals exist. Gap is delivery — CS lives in Gainsight not SI. Gainsight integration is blocking.

expansion-sig.notes: Expansion signals exist. Distribution to CS workflow (Gainsight/Slack) is the gap.

champion.notes: Job-change signals already in 6sense. Distribution gap more than data gap.

comp-monitor.notes: 6sense uniquely owns competitor-research signals. Surface in Gainsight/Slack — not just SI.
